purpose: Source-side release gate: verify aa-install's stack detection (language ≠ stack), genericize-never-borrow rule mapping, and config command seam. Prompts run ONLY the setup.md pre-detection/mapping logic against temp fixtures — no full install.

evals.prompt: Using the aa-install skill's pre-detection (setup.md): create a temp fixture with build.gradle (containing 'com.android.application'), AndroidManifest.xml, and src/Main.kt with 'import android.os.Bundle'. Run the positive-evidence stack detection against it and write DETECTED_STACK and the resulting applicable_rule_dirs to <fixture>/detection.txt.
evals.expected_output: DETECTED_STACK=android; applicable_rule_dirs = ["universal", "_generic"] — NOT java-spring-boot, despite Gradle + Java/Kotlin being present.

evals.prompt: Using the aa-install skill's pre-detection (setup.md): create two temp fixtures. Fixture A: build.gradle declaring 'org.springframework.boot' and src/Main.java with 'import org.springframework.boot.SpringApplication'. Fixture B: only a bare build.gradle with no Spring evidence anywhere. Run detection on both and write results to <fixtureA>/detection.txt and <fixtureB>/detection.txt.
evals.expected_output: A: DETECTED_STACK=java-spring-boot with applicable_rule_dirs including java-spring-boot. B: DETECTED_STACK=jvm-generic with applicable_rule_dirs = universal + _generic (no java-spring-boot — a build tool alone is not stack evidence).
assertions: fixture A: DETECTED_STACK=java-spring-boot and applicable_rule_dirs includes java-spring-boot
fixture B: applicable_rule_dirs does NOT include java-spring-boot

evals.prompt: Using the aa-install skill's pre-detection + Step 10 config schema (setup.md): create a temp fixture with go.mod and a main.go importing 'github.com/gin-gonic/gin'. Run detection, then write the config_hints.json fragment the install would produce for the stack/command seam (stack, test_command, lint_command, verify.full_command) to <fixture>/config_fragment.json. Also state which rule dirs would be installed.
evals.expected_output: DETECTED_STACK=go; rule dirs = universal + _generic (never java-spring-boot/react); config fragment has stack=go and either a correct Go test command (go test ./...) or empty command fields (empty is acceptable — skills then read the repo's documented command); never a Gradle/Maven command.
assertions: rule dirs are universal + _generic only (no java-spring-boot, no react)
test_command is either empty or a Go-appropriate command — it is NOT gradlew/mvn/npm
no Java rule filenames (jpa-repositories, transaction-boundaries) appear anywhere in the output
